scripts.render: yarn render:addercursor-cloudkiss && yarn render:addercursor-secretaryblonde && yarn render:addercursor-electricsheen && yarn render:addercursor-laurellamina && yarn render:addercursor-barcalonaoxblood
scripts.build:addercursor-cloudkiss: ctgen build.toml -d 'bitmaps/AdderDot-CloudKiss' -n 'AdderDot-CloudKiss' -c 'Cerulian → White dot cursor, inspired by Adder Inds.'
scripts.build:addercursor-secretaryblonde: ctgen build.toml -d 'bitmaps/AdderDot-SecretaryBlonde' -n 'AdderDot-SecretaryBlonde' -c 'Pale Blonde → Deep Blue-Green dot cursor, inspired by Adder Inds.'
scripts.build:addercursor-electricsheen: ctgen build.toml -d 'bitmaps/AdderDot-ElectricSheen' -n 'AdderDot-ElectricSheen' -c 'Azure Lake → Deep Sea Blue dot cursor, inspired by Adder Inds.'
scripts.build:addercursor-laurellamina: ctgen build.toml -d 'bitmaps/AdderDot-LaurelLamina' -n 'AdderDot-LaurelLamina' -c 'Deep Emerald → Laurel Green dot cursor, inspired by Adder Inds.'
scripts.build:addercursor-barcalonaoxblood: ctgen build.toml -d 'bitmaps/AdderDot-BarcalonaOxblood' -n 'AdderDot-BarcalonaOxblood' -c 'Oxblood → Tearsoaked White dot cursor, inspired by Adder Inds.'
scripts.build: yarn build:addercursor-cloudkiss && yarn build:addercursor-secretaryblonde && yarn build:addercursor-electricsheen && yarn build:addercursor-laurellamina && yarn build:addercursor-barcalonaoxblood
